caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium in front of a textured, dark green wall with a geometric, recessed pattern. He is dressed in a light-colored, long-sleeved shirt layered with a matching light-colored Nehru vest. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. To his side, a tall, thin glass cylinder contains decorative floral elements atop a wooden base. As the sequence progresses, Modi engages in a speech, using various hand gestures to emphasize his points. He begins by extending both hands outward, then transitions to a more neutral posture with his hands resting on the podium. He then raises his right hand in a gesturing motion before finally pointing upward with his index finger. His facial expression remains focused and serious throughout the clip as he speaks.
